title: Cross Guild Changes the Seas
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Coby, Kaido, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Buggy as New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.
scene: New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This should cheer you up, chopper.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Helmsman, jinbe, the Knight of the Sea Bounty: $1,100,000,000

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just leave number four to his sour grapes.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Fleet Captain, Emperor Straw hat Luffy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let me out already I'm hungry....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who are you calling number four?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: mind your tone around this crew's 2nd!!

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: The world's greatest swordsman... talk about scary!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I thought it was all over...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...when they banned the warlords and all those naval ships showed up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should've known Chairman buggy had something up his sleeve!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll do anything! I'll even... luck your boots clean!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cross Guild was supposed to be under me and Hawkeye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So tell me, why are you considered the boss, buggy...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't do anything about it but apologize!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It really isn't a big deal or anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You're probably the only person in history...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to become an emperor after crying for mercy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can't find the words for it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so nostalgic to be serving you again.:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Galdino! How could you turn on me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't recall ever joining your crew officially, buffoon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's a cold, harsh world out there.

summary: This part advances the Post-Wano World Shift through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
